prompt: how can we make the Archon VS Code extension better and what killer features should we add

assertions.text: Report references specific Archon features/code (e.g., memory system, pipeline editor, tools) — not generic advice
Report includes at least 5 numbered inline citations [N] linked to a Sources section with real URLs
Report discusses features from at least 3 competing AI coding extensions (e.g., Cursor, Cline, Continue, Copilot, Aider)
Report provides at least 3 specific, actionable feature recommendations (not vague suggestions)
Report surfaces at least 1 trade-off, counter-argument, or contradiction rather than being purely promotional
Report follows a structured format with executive summary, themed sections, and sources — not a wall of text
Report includes sources from 2025 or 2026 — not just outdated information
